quality.rationale: 基于度规张量进行指标提升运算，逻辑链条完整清晰且极易推广至任意分量或基底；但属纯微分几何抽象形式，缺乏具体天体物理或实验观测场景。

origin.question: (b) To what vector does the one-form $\widetilde{\mathbf{dx}}^1$ correspond?
origin.solution: (b) The vector $\mathbf{g}^{1a}\\partial/\\partial\\mathbf{x}^a \\equiv \mathbf{g}^{1a}\\mathbf{e}_a$ corresponds to $\widetilde{\mathrm{d}}\mathbf{x}^1$ since, for any vector $\mathbf{v}$\n$$\n\\mathbf {v} \\cdot \\mathbf {g}^{1 \\alpha} \\mathbf {e}_{\\alpha} = \\mathbf {v}^{\\mu} \\mathbf {e}_{\\mu} \\cdot \\mathbf {g}^{1 \\alpha} \\mathbf {e}_{\\alpha} = \\mathbf {v}^{\\mu} \\mathbf {g}_{\\mu \\alpha} \\mathbf {g}^{1 \\alpha} = \\mathbf {v}^{\\mu} \\delta_{\\mu}^{1} = \\mathbf {v}^{1} = < \\widetilde {\\mathbf {d x}}^{1}, \\mathbf {v} >.$$
